description: Send notifications to your own WxPusher destination through the UnitySVC gateway. POST the unified message envelope {title, body, type, format}; the gateway composes an Apprise wxpusher:// URL from your stored secrets and delivers via apprise.unitysvc.dev. The free apprise channel uses your own stored credentials; the apprise-plus channel binds extra per-enrollment destinations via parameters.
name: msg-to-wxpusher

request.template: {"urls":"wxpusher://${ customer_secrets.WXPUSHER_TOKEN }/${ customer_secrets.WXPUSHER_TARGETS }","title":{* _escape_json(_body.title or "") *},"body":{* _escape_json(_body.body or "") *},"type":{* _escape_json(_body.type or "info") *},"format":{* _escape_json(_body.format or "text") *}}

{"urls":"wxpusher://${ customer_secrets.{{ params.token_secret }} }/${ customer_secrets.{{ params.targets_secret }} }","title":{* _escape_json(_body.title or "") *},"body":{* _escape_json(_body.body or "") *},"type":{* _escape_json(_body.type or "info") *},"format":{* _escape_json(_body.format or "text") *}}
